title: skills.lock v0.1
description: Approved AI Skill capability surface. See SPEC.md at https://github.com/skills-lock/skil-lock/blob/main/SPEC.md

schema_version.description: Lockfile schema version. v0.1 is the only currently published value.

generated_by.description: Tool identifier and version, space-separated. Example: 'skil-lock 0.1.0'.

skills.description: Map of skill name to skill entry. Empty map (`{}`) when no skills are present.

runtime.description: AI runtime this skill targets. v0.2 may add 'cursor', 'windsurf', 'mcp'.

source_path.description: Forward-slash, repo-relative path to the SKILL.md file.

version.description: Free-form version string from SKILL.md frontmatter; empty when the skill does not declare one.

content_hash.description: SHA-256 of the SKILL.md raw bytes.

script_hashes.description: Optional map of bundled-script path -> SHA-256 of that file's raw bytes. Emitted by default whenever a skill ships scripts; closes the gap where content_hash covers SKILL.md only, so a rewritten script body trips the diff. Omitted for skills with no bundled scripts.

stringList.description: Sorted ascending, deduplicated list of strings. Empty list ([]) is allowed.
